title: grindelia camporum var. interioris
intro: Grindelia camporum var. interioris, also known as Interior Gum Plant, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It is a member of the sunflower family and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Grindelia camporum var. interioris include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and treat skin irritations, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and eczema. The plant can be prepared for consumption in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically in salves and ointments to promote healing and reduce discomfort.
